revision.comment: /* Complete list of the links generated */ Update
revision.text: This is a helper template for the documentation of [[Module:Params]] that creates a link to the line in the Lua code where a function or a modifier is declared. == Usage == * {{demo inline|{{module:params/doc/link to the code|squeezing}}}} * {{demo inline|{{module:params/doc/link to the code|cutting|Lorem ipsum}}}} == Complete list of the links generated == # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|sequential}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|non-sequential}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|all_sorted}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|reassorted}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|setting}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|squeezing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|filling_the_gaps}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|clearing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|cutting}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|cropping}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|purging}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|backpurging}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|reversing_numeric_names}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|sorting_sequential_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|imposing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|providing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|discarding}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|excluding_non-numeric_names}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|excluding_numeric_names}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|with_name_matching}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|with_name_not_matching}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|with_value_matching}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|with_value_not_matching}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|trimming_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_to_lowercase}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_to_uppercase}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_calling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_invoking}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_magic}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_replacing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_mixing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_to_lowercase}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_to_uppercase}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_to_sequence}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_calling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_invoking}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_magic}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_replacing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_mixing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|grouping_by_calling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|parsing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|reinterpreting}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mixing_names_and_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|combining}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|combining_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|combining_by_calling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|snapshotting}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|remembering}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|entering_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|pulling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|detaching_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|dropping_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|leaving_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|merging_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|flushing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|count}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|concat_and_call}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|concat_and_invoke}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|concat_and_magic}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|value_of}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|list}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|list_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|list_maybe_with_names}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|coins}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|unique_coins}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|for_each}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|call_for_each}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|invoke_for_each}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|magic_for_each}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|call_for_each_value}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|invoke_for_each_value}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|magic_for_each_value}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|call_for_each_group}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|new}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|self}} == Updating the list == After each update in the code of [[Module:Params]] the list of line numbers stored in this template needs to be updated. If you use [[GNU]] or other [[Unix-like]] operating systems you can do that automatically by launching: grep -n '^library.\|^static_iface.' params.lua | sed 's/\(library\|static_iface\)\(\.\|\['\''\)\|'\''\]\|\s*=\s*function\s*([^)]\+)//g;s/^\([0-9]\+\):\(.\+\)$/ | \2 = L-\1/g' {{Sandbox other|| }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23208182735|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: This is a helper template for the documentation of [[Module:Params]] that creates a link to the line in the Lua code where a function or a modifier is declared. == Usage == * {{demo inline|{{module:params/doc/link to the code|squeezing}}}} * {{demo inline|{{module:params/doc/link to the code|cutting|Lorem ipsum}}}} == Complete list of the links generated == # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|sequential}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|non-sequential}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|all_sorted}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|reassorted}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|setting}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|squeezing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|filling_the_gaps}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|clearing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|cutting}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|cropping}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|purging}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|backpurging}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|reversing_numeric_names}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|sorting_sequential_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|imposing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|providing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|discarding}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|excluding_non-numeric_names}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|excluding_numeric_names}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|with_name_matching}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|with_name_not_matching}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|with_value_matching}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|with_value_not_matching}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|trimming_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_to_lowercase}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_to_uppercase}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_calling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_invoking}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_magic}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_replacing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mapping_by_mixing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_to_lowercase}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_to_uppercase}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_to_sequence}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_calling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_invoking}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_magic}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_replacing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|renaming_by_mixing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|grouping_by_calling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|parsing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|reinterpreting}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|mixing_names_and_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|combining}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|combining_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|combining_by_calling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|snapshotting}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|remembering}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|entering_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|pulling}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|detaching_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|dropping_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|leaving_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|merging_substack}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|flushing}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|count}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|concat_and_call}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|concat_and_invoke}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|concat_and_magic}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|value_of}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|list}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|list_values}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|list_maybe_with_names}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|coins}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|unique_coins}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|for_each}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|call_for_each}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|invoke_for_each}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|magic_for_each}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|call_for_each_value}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|invoke_for_each_value}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|magic_for_each_value}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|call_for_each_group}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|new}} # {{module:params/doc/link to the code|self}} == Updating the list == After each update in the code of [[Module:Params]] the list of line numbers stored in this template needs to be updated. If you use [[GNU]] or other [[Unix-like]] operating systems you can do that automatically by launching: grep -n '^library.\|^static_iface.' params.lua | sed 's/\(library\|static_iface\)\(\.\|\['\''\)\|'\''\]\|\s*=\s*function\s*([^)]\+)//g;s/^\([0-9]\+\):\(.\+\)$/ | \2 = L-\1/g' {{Sandbox other|| }}
